name: Crockpot Spaghetti Sauce
recipeIngredient: 2 pounds sausage (Italian links or country style)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat 2 tablespoons of cooking oil in a frying pan over medium heat. Brown the ground beef until fully cooked.
2. Add the finely chopped onion to the pan and continue browning the meat and onions together until the onions are tender, about 5 minutes.
3. Transfer the browned meat mixture into the 3.5-quart crockpot.
4. Stir in the tomato sauce, water, salt, pepper, red pepper flakes (if using), oregano, tomato puree, and tomato paste.
5. Cover with the lid and set the dial to low heat setting.
6. Cut the sausage into pieces and brown them in the remaining 2 tablespoons of cooking oil over medium heat until fully cooked.
7. Add the browned sausage pieces to the crockpot with the sauce mixture.
8. Cook for 12 hours on the low setting, stirring occasionally if desired.
9. For a sweeter sauce, you may add up to 1/2 cup of sugar during the last hour of cooking.
